name: gecko-trade-agent
description: Self-hostable trading agent with a transparent multi-voice gate + pre-execution devil's advocate. Five voices — chart, regime, memory, risk, strategist — debate every entry through a code-pinned coordinator, surfaced live in a dashboard. Paper-default; honest about edge (10 published nulls, breakout is -EV in chop). For crypto operators evaluating someone else's signals, not building new ones. Plugs into OKX onchainOS today; SendAI Solana Agent Kit landing in Phase B.
author: Gecko
triggers: Show me the agent voices trading
Paper trade with a transparent gate
